word: G3632 - οἰνοφλυγία - oinophlygía - oy-nof-loog-ee'-ah - Excess of wine

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οἰνοφλυγία

- Transliteration: Oinophlugia

- Phonetic: oy-nof-loog-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. drunkenness

- Origin: from G3631 and a form of the base of G5397

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G3631 and a form of the base of G5397; an overflow (or surplus) of wine that is vinolency (drunkenness): - excess of wine.
